# howion.com

> Personal website of Omer Mert Coskun ("howion"), a software developer and researcher working across mathematics, software, and design.

This site is a single-page personal website. It introduces the author, outlines current research and development interests, highlights selected work, and provides contact and profile links.

Prefer the homepage for the main overview. Use the optional links for deeper context about notes, open-source work, and external profiles.

## Primary

- [Homepage](https://www.howion.com/): Main overview of Mert Coskun, including bio, research interests, development work, tech stack, featured work, and contact details.

## Projects and Work

- [Anatolia: 19th Century](https://anatolia19.metu.edu.tr/): Digital humanities project focused on compiling and digitizing historical regional data.
- [notes.howion.com](https://notes.howion.com/): Personal wiki and note-taking system with technical and mathematical notes.
- [Speculo](https://speculo.howion.com/): Peer-to-peer mobile-to-desktop device orientation mirroring project.
- [lambert-w-function](https://www.npmjs.com/package/lambert-w-function): Open-source TypeScript implementation of the Lambert W function.
- [HUID Spec and Implementation](https://github.com/howionlabs/huid-spec): Snowflake-style custom unique identifier specification and implementation.
- [nth-harmonic](https://github.com/howion/nth-harmonic): TypeScript library for computing the nth harmonic number efficiently.

## Official Profiles

- [GitHub](https://github.com/howion/): Main code hosting profile.
- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/omer-mert-coskun/): Professional profile.
- [ORCID](https://orcid.org/0000-0002-8324-2325): Academic identity profile.
- [Behance](https://www.behance.net/howion): Design portfolio.
- [Dribbble](https://dribbble.com/howion): Design work and experiments.
- [X](https://x.com/howionwastaken): Social profile.
- [Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/omermertcoskun/): Personal social profile.
- [IMDb](https://www.imdb.com/user/ur106540372): Film-related profile.

## Optional

- [Spotify](https://open.spotify.com/user/avxit10lkjwlmlw605mxg7nbe): Personal listening profile embedded on the site.
